name: Google Sheets Logger
description: Logs WhatsApp message events to a Google Sheet via a service account.
author: Yudhi Armyndharis & OpenWA Contributors

serviceAccountJson.title: Service Account JSON
serviceAccountJson.description: Full service-account key JSON. Share the target sheet with this account's client_email (Editor).

spreadsheetId.title: Spreadsheet ID
spreadsheetId.description: The ID from the sheet URL: /spreadsheets/d/<ID>/edit
